name: The Sims at Prairie Falls
address: 3200 N Spokane St, Post Falls, ID 83854
about: Prairie Falls Golf Club is a mini resort destination in Post Falls, Idaho, featuring 6 virtual golf simulator bays. The venue offers a unique combination of year-round golf and on-site hotel suites, providing a Stay & Play experience. Simulators are available for hourly rates and accommodate up to 6 people per bay. The facility includes amenities like a full restaurant and bar menu, couch and high-top seating within the bays, and club rentals. The venue also hosts private events, leagues, tournaments, and watch parties, positioning itself as a multifunctional sports and event center.
why_golfers_like_it: Only destination in the area with both year-round golf and hotel rooms
95+ virtual golf courses from around the world
Full restaurant and bar menu available within the facility
Simulator bays can accommodate up to 6 people, ideal for groups
Streaming capabilities for watch parties and events

food_and_drink.notes: Restaurant & bar serves alcohol, including draft beer and specialty cocktails

simulator_hardware.notes: Mentioned as the simulator provider on the website

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available at the venue. You can use your own clubs or rent them on-site.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: A full restaurant & bar menu is available within the facility, so you can purchase food and drinks there.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: This information is not explicitly provided on the website.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue accommodates groups of up to 6 people per bay and offers a family-friendly environment with food and drink options.
